build.description: Build, edit, and implement code for EduPlatform (School Administrative)

plan.description: Plan architecture, trace codebases, design implementation strategies

laravel-dev.description: Laravel backend development: controllers, services, models, migrations, routes

vue-dev.description: Vue 3 frontend development: pages, components, composables, router, services

reviewer.description: Code review: check errors, conventions, security, and consistency

session-save.description: Save current session context to session log
session-save.template: Save the current session context to .opencode/session_logs/ with: (1) summary of work done, (2) decisions made, (3) files modified, (4) pending tasks, (5) next steps. Use format YYYY-MM-DD_topic.md.

session-load.description: Load and summarize the latest session context
session-load.template: Read the latest session log from .opencode/session_logs/ and provide a summary of: current project state, pending tasks, recent decisions, and what to do next.

session-status.description: Check session status and pending tasks
session-status.template: Check the current session status: read the latest session log, list any pending tasks, and show what files were modified in the last session.

done.description: Mark current task as complete and show shutdown checklist
done.template: The current task is complete. Show the SESSION SHUTDOWN CHECKLIST with: task status, files modified, verification results, summary, and next steps. Ask user to confirm saving session.

checkpoint.template: Save a mid-session checkpoint to .opencode/session_logs/ with: current task state, files modified so far, what's in progress, and next steps. This is for context preservation, not session end.
